# Government School Management Portal — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P3-govt-school-govt-school-portal
**Vertical slug:** govt-school
**VN-ID:** VN-EDU-001
**Niche family:** NF-EDU-GOV (standalone)
**Family role:** standalone
**Research date:** 2026-04-26

## 1. Nigerian Business Reality
Nigeria's public school system serves over 30 million pupils across 60,000+ public primary schools and 10,000+ public secondary schools managed by State Universal Basic Education Boards (SUBEBs), State Ministries of Education, and the Federal Ministry of Education. School-Based Management Committees (SBMCs) are statutory governance bodies. Most public schools lack digital presence. Parent engagement is via WhatsApp class groups. School portals improve transparency, attendance tracking, and community communication.

## 2. Target Audience Profile
- **Parent Mrs Folake, 36, Lagos**: Wants to check school events calendar, fee waiver announcements, and WAEC result summary. Contacts school via WhatsApp group.
- **SBMC Chairman Alhaji Musa, 52, Kano**: Needs to publish meeting resolutions and school development fund report publicly. Values transparency portal.
- **SUBEB Inspector, Ibadan**: Reviewing school compliance — checks staff roster, facility status, and SBMC meeting records on portal.

## 3. Recommended Website Structure
- **Home**: Hero (school name, motto, SUBEB state), announcements ticker, WhatsApp parent group CTA, principal's message, school at a glance (stats)
- **About**: School history, principal bio, SBMC listing, staff directory, SUBEB registration
- **Services (Academics)**: Class schedule, subjects, exam results summary, extracurricular activities, school fees and waiver info
- **Contact**: WhatsApp contact, SBMC enquiry form (NDPR-compliant), location, LGA/SUBEB details

## 4. Content Tone & Voice
Formal, community-accountable, transparency-first. "SUBEB Approved", "SBMC Governed", "Every Child Deserves Quality Education" language. Reference UBEC, SUBEB, WAEC, NECO. Avoid commercial tone. Primary CTA: "Contact School Office via WhatsApp". Secondary: "View Announcements".

## 5. Trust Signal Inventory
- SUBEB registration and approval number
- Ministry of Education operating licence
- SBMC membership list published
- WAEC/NECO school registration number
- UBEC compliance badge
- Staff qualifications (NTI, TRCN)

## 6. Image Direction (5-7 Specific Concepts)
1. School assembly — pupils in uniform, Nigerian flag, morning devotion
2. Classroom — well-maintained, blackboard, attentive pupils, natural light
3. SBMC meeting — community leaders, teachers, chairs around table
4. Principal and staff — professional photo, school building backdrop
5. Sports day — pupils in house colours, Nigerian public school ground
6. School building exterior — clean, repainted, flag flying
7. WAEC results display — notice board with results, students celebrating

## 7. Regulatory Compliance Checklist
- [ ] SUBEB registration displayed
- [ ] Ministry of Education operating licence number shown
- [ ] SBMC governance structure published
- [ ] NDPR consent on any contact form
- [ ] Child data protection notice (NDPR for under-18s)

## 8. Nigeria-First Compliance Checklist
- [x] WhatsApp school contact CTA
- [x] SUBEB/Ministry trust signals
- [x] Nigerian state/LGA references
- [x] Nigerian pupil/teacher context
- [x] SBMC governance references
- [x] Mobile-first layout (low-bandwidth context)
- [x] esc() on all inputs
- [x] NDPR on contact form
